name: Avga o Graten (Eggs Au Gratin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each egg into 8 pieces. Lightly salt and pepper them.
2. Prepare the béchamel sauce.
3. Mix together half of the sauce, the eggs, and three-quarters of the cheese.
4. Butter a small pan.
5. Spread a thin layer of béchamel over the bottom and sprinkle with a little cheese.
6. Add the egg mixture and spread evenly.
7. Add the remaining sauce and spread carefully over the eggs.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese and then the bread crumbs.
9. Drizzle melted butter over the top.
10. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
